projects.title: Causal Intervention Versus Attention
projects.summary: Compares intervention-based causal tracing against attention-derived signals for extracting biologically meaningful regulatory edges.

projects.title: Evaluation Bias Protocol
projects.summary: Defines a reproducible protocol that quantifies how mapping, candidate sets, and scoring rules distort benchmark conclusions.

projects.title: Head and Layer Specialization Atlas
projects.summary: Maps where biological signals localize across transformer heads and layers to identify specialization patterns.

projects.title: Cross-Tissue Probe Threshold Transfer
projects.summary: Tests whether probe thresholds learned in one tissue transfer reliably to others without performance collapse.

projects.title: Prior-Enhanced Signaling Inference
projects.summary: Injects curated prior knowledge into signaling inference while measuring gains and failure modes.

projects.title: Scaling Failure Analysis
projects.summary: Analyzes why model and inference quality can degrade with scale across data size, model size, and evaluation settings.

projects.title: Perturbation-to-Network Bridging
projects.summary: Connects perturb-seq effects to network edges for functionally grounded validation of inferred mechanisms.

projects.title: Attention Failure Meta-Study
projects.summary: Systematic meta-analysis of attention-based failure cases and the conditions that produce misleading edges.

projects.title: Causal Mediation Circuit Map
projects.summary: Builds circuit-level mediation maps to separate direct from indirect model pathways behind predictions.

projects.title: Identifiability Under Latent Cell-State Confounding
projects.summary: Studies when regulatory claims remain identifiable under hidden cell-state confounders.

projects.title: Counterfactual Perturbation Consistency
projects.summary: Checks whether model behavior remains consistent under counterfactual perturbation scenarios.

projects.title: Invariant Causal Edges
projects.summary: Finds regulatory edges that remain stable across seeds, tissues, and evaluation choices.

projects.title: Detectability Phase Diagram
projects.summary: Characterizes where biological effects are detectable versus irrecoverable under noise and sample constraints.

projects.title: Patching Mediation Bias Bounds
projects.summary: Quantifies bias introduced by activation patching and derives practical bounds for mediation claims.

projects.title: Mechanistic Robustness Index
projects.summary: Introduces a composite robustness score to compare interpretability methods under realistic shifts.

projects.title: Multi-Reference Latent Truth Model
projects.summary: Combines multiple imperfect references to estimate latent ground truth for fairer evaluation.

projects.title: Evaluation Invariance Metrics
projects.summary: Develops metrics that track whether conclusions are invariant to preprocessing and evaluation policy changes.

projects.title: Identifiability Bounds
projects.summary: Derives empirical bounds on what mechanisms can be identified from available observational and perturbation data.

projects.title: Agentic Regulatory Network Discovery
projects.summary: Uses coordinated agents to automate hypothesis generation, testing, and network refinement.

projects.title: Cell-State Conditional Circuits
projects.summary: Discovers circuits that activate conditionally on cell state and developmental context.

projects.title: Pseudotime Directionality Audit
projects.summary: Audits whether inferred interactions respect pseudotime directionality and lineage progression.

projects.title: Ortholog Transfer Stress Test
projects.summary: Stress-tests cross-species transfer by evaluating ortholog-based mechanism portability.

projects.title: Uncertainty Calibration for Edge Scores
projects.summary: Calibrates edge confidence so network scores better match empirical reliability.

projects.title: Active Perturbation Selection
projects.summary: Selects highest-value perturbations to maximize information gain under fixed experimental budgets.

projects.title: Batch and Donor Leakage Audit
projects.summary: Detects and mitigates leakage from batch and donor effects in model interpretation pipelines.

projects.title: Higher-Order Motif Recovery
projects.summary: Recovers multi-gene regulatory motifs beyond pairwise edges from model internals.

projects.title: Counterfactual Compositional Shift
projects.summary: Evaluates robustness when cell-type composition shifts between training and deployment conditions.

projects.title: Disagreement Typology and Consensus
projects.summary: Classifies method disagreements and builds consensus strategies for stable conclusions.

projects.title: Clinical-Anchored Prioritization
projects.summary: Prioritizes hypotheses using clinical relevance constraints alongside mechanistic evidence.

projects.title: Geometric Residual Stream Interpretability
projects.summary: Interprets residual-stream geometry to identify biologically meaningful representation structure.

projects.title: Sparse Dictionary Autoloop
projects.summary: Automates sparse dictionary experiments for iterative feature discovery and validation.

projects.title: Topology Hypothesis Screening Autoloop
projects.summary: Runs automated screening of topological hypotheses about learned representation manifolds.

projects.title: Claude Topology Hypothesis Screening Autoloop
projects.summary: Parallel autoloop implementation focused on topology hypothesis generation and review.

projects.title: Sparse Autoencoder Biological Map
projects.summary: Maps sparse autoencoder features to biological functions and pathway-level semantics.

projects.title: General Autoloop Engine
projects.summary: Reusable engine for orchestrating iterative hypothesis-execution-review research loops.

projects.title: Geneformer Polynomial Manifold Interpretability
projects.summary: Explores polynomial manifold structure in Geneformer representations for interpretability signals.

projects.title: Curiosity-Driven Bio MechInterp Autoloop
projects.summary: Curiosity-driven autoloop that proposes and tests novel mechanistic hypotheses in biological models.

projects.title: Claude Curiosity-Driven Bio MechInterp Autoloop
projects.summary: Claude-based variant of the curiosity autoloop for independent hypothesis exploration.

articles.title: Three Classes of Confound in Gene-Regulatory-Network Inference: A Systematic Audit and Open-Source Diagnostic Toolkit
articles.summary: Introduces a unified audit toolkit for technical leakage, genomic-proximity inflation, and degree-distribution artifacts in inferred gene regulatory networks, showing that joint confound filtering removes most candidate edges and improves perturbation-grounded reliability.

articles.title: Two Axes in the Gene-Embedding Space of Single-Cell Foundation Models: What a Protein Language Model Already Knows, and what Requires Single-Cell Pretraining
articles.summary: Compares seven single-cell foundation models against a protein language model and a co-expression baseline, showing which biological signals come from protein-sequence information alone and which truly require single-cell training to capture regulatory structure.

articles.title: Adversarial validation of in silico perturbation profiles for intelligence-associated genes in human prefrontal cortex
articles.summary: Introduces an adversarial-validation framework for foundation-model perturbation claims and shows that raw Geneformer perturbation shifts in human DLPFC are heavily expression-confounded, with no individual gene surviving expression-matched null testing.

articles.title: Inflammation-Linked Aging Signals in Frozen Single-Cell Foundation Models: Donor-Aware Detection and Robustness Testing
articles.summary: Presents a donor-aware interpretability workflow for testing aging signals in frozen scGPT and Geneformer representations, finding biologically plausible inflammatory aging structure but weak replication under stricter donor- and composition-aware controls.

articles.title: Exhaustive Circuit Mapping of a Single-Cell Foundation Model Reveals Massive Redundancy, Heavy-Tailed Hub Architecture, and Layer-Dependent Differentiation Control
articles.summary: Uses exhaustive circuit tracing, higher-order combinatorial ablation, and causal trajectory steering in Geneformer to reveal hub-heavy redundancy and layer-dependent control of differentiation directionality.

articles.title: Discovery of a Hematopoietic Manifold in scGPT Yields a Method for Extracting Performant Algorithms from Biological Foundation Model Internals
articles.summary: Reports a compact hematopoietic algorithm extracted from scGPT internals, with strong donor-holdout performance, large efficiency gains, and interpretable core factors aligned to hematopoietic gene programs.

articles.title: Quantifying Ranking Instability Across Evaluation Protocol Axes in Gene Regulatory Network Benchmarking
articles.summary: Introduces a diagnostic framework for ranking instability in GRN benchmarks and quantifies reversal risk across candidate sets, tissue context, and reference network choices.

articles.title: Sparse Autoencoders Reveal Interpretable Cell-Type Programs in Single-Cell Foundation Model Representations
articles.summary: Applies sparse autoencoders to scGPT residual activations and shows interpretable, biologically coherent feature programs with domain-specific sparsity calibration requirements.

articles.title: Sparse autoencoders reveal organized biological knowledge but minimal regulatory logic in single-cell foundation models: a comparative atlas of Geneformer and scGPT
articles.summary: Comprehensive SAE atlases across Geneformer and scGPT show rich biological organization and modular structure, while CRISPRi validation indicates limited causal regulatory logic encoding.

articles.title: Causal Circuit Tracing Reveals Distinct Computational Architectures in Single-Cell Foundation Models: Inhibitory Dominance, Biological Coherence, and Cross-Model Convergence
articles.summary: Introduces causal circuit tracing with SAE feature ablations in Geneformer and scGPT, reporting inhibitory-dominant dynamics, cross-model consensus circuits, and CRISPRi-grounded validation.

articles.title: What Topological and Geometric Structure Do Biological Foundation Models Learn? Evidence from 141 Hypotheses
articles.summary: Autonomous large-scale hypothesis screening investigates which geometric and topological structures emerge in internal representations of scGPT and Geneformer, and how biologically meaningful they are.

articles.title: Multi-Dimensional Spectral Geometry of Biological Knowledge in Single-Cell Transformer Representations
articles.summary: Systematic decoding of scGPT internal geometry through automated hypothesis screening reveals structured biological organization in gene representations.

articles.title: Systematic Evaluation of Single-Cell Foundation Model Interpretability Reveals Attention Captures Co-Expression Rather Than Unique Regulatory Signal
articles.summary: A large evaluation framework across cell types, perturbation modalities, and statistical tests finds attention captures structured biology but largely co-expression rather than unique regulatory signal.

articles.title: Scaling Laws for Masked-Reconstruction Transformers on Single-Cell Transcriptomics
articles.summary: Systematic analysis of scaling behavior for masked-reconstruction transformers on scRNA-seq data, examining power-law relationships between loss, model size, and data.
